items.name_en: ❤️B's latest tote, crafted from calfskin suede. Made in an Italian workshop with matching fabric lining. Features the iconic B-shaped closure, smooth calfskin trim, and a top handle. Includes a detachable leather shoulder strap for easy switching between tote and shoulder bag styles. Embossed equestrian knight logo (EKD) on the back. Dimensions 30 x 13 x 24cm.
items.name_cn: ❤️B's latest tote, crafted from calfskin suede. Made in an Italian workshop with matching fabric lining. Features the iconic B-shaped closure, smooth calfskin trim, and a top handle. items.name_en: Original: This is the most exquisite and well-shaped crossbody bag from Brand B. Made from selected full-grain leather spliced with House tartan pieces, the shape is exquisite and structured. The bag features an open interior compartment and an external zip pocket for easy storage. Dimensions: 24 x 4 x 17.5cm ❤️❤️ Model: 8251
